title: Revoke or replace financial relationships
description: Correct transfer and refund relationships through attributable lifecycle events. Implements G4 and G6 through UC-LEDGER-011.
rationale: Incorrect links distort actuals just as incorrect transactions do and therefore require explicit reversible correction rather than silent editing.
story_want: revoke or replace an incorrect transfer or refund link
story_so_that: actuals are recalculated without losing the prior decision
acceptance_criteria: Given an active transfer or refund relationship and a reason, when the owner revokes it, then it becomes retired, the event is attributable, and active actuals are recalculated atomically.

Given an active relationship and proposed replacement participants, when the owner replaces it with a reason, then role exclusivity, cardinality, amount conservation, account, currency, sign, and lifecycle rules are revalidated before the prior relationship is retired and exactly one valid replacement is activated atomically.
Given an inactive relationship, when it is revoked again, then the Ledger returns a stable lifecycle error and changes no actuals.

Given any retired relationship, when history-inclusive detail is requested, then its participants, type, lifecycle reason, actor context, time, and replacement reference where applicable remain queryable.
